glosses.vi: sự phá hủy; sự tiêu hủy

sentences.target: Ils parlent de la destruction du vieux cinéma.
sentences.reading: /il paʁl də la dɛstʁyksjɔ̃ dy vjø sinema/

translations.fr: Ils parlent de la destruction du vieux cinéma.
translations.ipa: /il paʁl də la dɛstʁyksjɔ̃ dy vjø sinema/
translations.en: They're talking about the destruction of the old cinema.
translations.es: Están hablando de la demolición del antiguo cine.
translations.de: Sie sprechen über den Abriss des alten Kinos.
translations.it: Stanno parlando della demolizione del vecchio cinema.
translations.ko: 그들은 오래된 영화관의 철거에 대해 이야기하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在谈论旧电影院的拆除。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺度講緊舊戲院嘅清拆。
translations.ru: Они говорят о сносе старого кинотеатра.
translations.pt: Eles estão falando da demolição do antigo cinema.
translations.he: הם מדברים על הריסת בית הקולנוע הישן.
translations.vi: Họ đang nói về việc phá dỡ rạp chiếu phim cũ.
translations.ar: هم يتحدثون عن هدم السينما القديمة.
translations.nl: Er wordt gesproken over de sloop van de oude bioscoop.
translations.uk: Вони говорять про знесення старого кінотеатру.
translations.hi: वे पुराने सिनेमाघर के विध्वंस के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μιλούν για την κατεδάφιση του παλιού κινηματογράφου.
translations.nb: De snakker om rivingen av den gamle kinoen.
translations.sv: De pratar om rivningen av den gamla biografen.
translations.ro: Ei vorbesc despre demolarea vechiului cinematograf.
translations.da: De taler om nedrivningen af den gamle biograf.
translations.ja: 彼らは古い映画館の取り壊しについて話している。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine). Serves as the subject of the verb 'parlent'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; predicate of the clause, agreeing with 'Ils'.
Preposition introducing the complement of 'parler' (parler de = talk about).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'destruction'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the prepositional complement governed by 'de'.
Contraction of 'de + le'; preposition linking the noun 'cinéma' (with its modifier) as a complement of 'destruction'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'cinéma'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du', complement of 'destruction'.

sentences.target: Je crains la destruction de cette maison.
sentences.reading: /ʒə krɛ̃ la dɛstʁyksjɔ̃ də sɛt mɛzɔ̃/

translations.fr: Je crains la destruction de cette maison.
translations.ipa: /ʒə krɛ̃ la dɛstʁyksjɔ̃ də sɛt mɛzɔ̃/
translations.en: I'm afraid of the destruction of this house.
translations.es: Temo la demolición de esta casa.
translations.de: Ich fürchte den Abriss dieses Hauses.
translations.it: Temo la demolizione di questa casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我担心这栋房子会被拆掉。
translations.pt: Eu temo a demolição desta casa.
translations.vi: Tôi sợ việc phá dỡ ngôi nhà này.
translations.nl: Ik ben bang voor de sloop van dit huis.
translations.hu: Félek ennek a háznak a lebontásától.
translations.hi: मुझे इस घर के विध्वंस से डर लगता है.
translations.el: Φοβάμαι την κατεδάφιση αυτού του σπιτιού.
translations.nb: Jeg frykter rivingen av dette huset.
translations.id: Saya takut akan pembongkaran rumah ini.
translations.sv: Jag är rädd för rivningen av det här huset.
translations.ro: Mi-e teamă de demolarea acestei case.
translations.da: Jeg frygter nedrivningen af dette hus.
translations.ja: 私はこの家の取り壊しが心配です。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'crains'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a direct object ('la destruction').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'destruction'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'crains'.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement specifying the target of the destruction.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; determiner of 'maison'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'de', complement of 'destruction'.

sentences.target: On parle de destruction près du parc.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁl də dɛstʁyksjɔ̃ pʁɛ dy paʁk/

translations.fr: On parle de destruction près du parc.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁl də dɛstʁyksjɔ̃ pʁɛ dy paʁk/
translations.en: People are talking about destruction near the park.
translations.es: Se habla de destrucción cerca del parque.
translations.de: Man spricht von Zerstörung in der Nähe des Parks.
translations.it: Si parla di distruzione vicino al parco.
translations.ko: 공원 근처에서 파괴에 대해 사람들이 이야기하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 人们在谈论公园附近的破坏。
translations.yue: 有人喺度講公園附近有破壞。
translations.pt: Fala-se em destruição perto do parque.
translations.vi: Mọi người đang bàn về sự tàn phá gần công viên.
translations.ar: يتحدث الناس عن دمار قرب الحديقة.
translations.nl: Er wordt gesproken over vernieling bij het park.
translations.hi: लोग पार्क के पास विनाश के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Mówi się o zniszczeniu w pobliżu parku.
translations.el: Γίνεται λόγος για καταστροφή κοντά στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Det snakkes om ødeleggelse nær parken.
translations.id: Orang-orang membicarakan kehancuran di dekat taman.
translations.sv: Det talas om förstörelse nära parken.
translations.ro: Se vorbește despre distrugere lângă parc.
translations.cs: Mluví se o destrukci poblíž parku.
translations.da: Der tales om ødelæggelse nær parken.
translations.ja: 公園の近くで破壊の話が出ている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of 'parle'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive with a 'de' complement.
Preposition selected by 'parler' to introduce the topic ('destruction').
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition 'de' (bare noun, indefinite).
First element of the complex preposition 'près de' marking proximity; introduces a locative complement.
Contraction of 'de + le'; preposition completing 'près' ('près du ...') and introducing the noun 'parc'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du' within the locative phrase.

sentences.target: La destruction du pont bloque le quartier.
sentences.reading: /la dɛstʁyksjɔ̃ dy pɔ̃ blɔk lə kaʁtje/

translations.fr: La destruction du pont bloque le quartier.
translations.ipa: /la dɛstʁyksjɔ̃ dy pɔ̃ blɔk lə kaʁtje/
translations.en: The destruction of the bridge blocks the neighborhood.
translations.es: La destrucción del puente bloquea el barrio.
translations.de: Die Zerstörung der Brücke blockiert das Viertel.
translations.it: La distruzione del ponte blocca il quartiere.
translations.zh-Hans: 桥梁的毁坏阻塞了社区的交通。
translations.yue: 座橋被毀令社區出入受阻。
translations.pt: A destruição da ponte bloqueia o bairro.
translations.vi: Sự phá hủy cây cầu khiến khu phố bị cô lập.
translations.nl: De vernietiging van de brug blokkeert de wijk.
translations.hu: A híd lerombolása megbénítja a környéket.
translations.hi: पुल के नष्ट होने से इलाका ठप पड़ गया है.
translations.el: Η καταστροφή της γέφυρας αποκόπτει τη γειτονιά.
translations.ja: 橋の破壊で地域が遮断されている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'destruction'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Contraction of 'de + le'; links the noun 'pont' as a complement of 'destruction' ('of the bridge').
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'du', complement of 'destruction'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the singular subject ('La destruction du pont') and takes a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'quartier'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'bloque'.
